use_cases: Hover-activated social sharing buttons for blog posts and articles
Copy-to-clipboard link functionality for content distribution
Compact share menu for product pages in e-commerce
Quick share actions for content creator platforms
Share widget for SaaS dashboard sharing features
ai_summary: A social sharing button component with hover-reveal functionality that displays multiple share options including Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and copy-link actions. Features smooth 300ms transitions between the main button state and expanded share icons, with full dark/light mode support and keyboard-accessible interaction patterns.
